status: runner built + gated; AnthropicClient.send is LIVE (Phase G) - the NotImplementedError stop is gone, so the fail-closed run gate (E2E_AB_RUN=1 + E2E_EXTERNAL=1 + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) is the SOLE guard and nothing in-tree opens it. Assay mode uses Math.NET's existing filtered Gamma tests as the hidden semantic oracle.

blinding.note: SAME tool name + output shape in both arms; only the backend content differs.

smoke.claims: plumbing-validation only; not an efficacy result

pilot.claims: directional diagnostics only; reports harm, completion, over-caution, and adherence separately; no p-value
pilot._note: seeds_per_arm is a replicate index, not a fixed model random seed.

assay.claims: assay-VALIDITY read via pre-registered verdict (see metrics/assay_interpret.py); NOT an efficacy claim on its own
assay._note: 9-arm assay for risky tasks: sham, oracle_positive, enforced_control, blast_radius, graph_context, pebra, pebra_graph_context, pebra_graph_repair, pebra_human_review. Safe tasks omit only oracle. The predeclared 2x2 is ordinary/graph Understand crossed with sham/real decision; repair and human-review remain separate mechanism controls. pebra_human_review adds a pre-registered host approval policy after ask_human; it is a mechanism proxy, not evidence about real human judgment. Reports keep autonomous completion, simulated approval-path completion, and unresolved safe escalation separate. Efficacy requires a separately predeclared claim_design with powered pair and independent-task requirements; seed count alone never authorizes a claim.

assay_js.claims: Three-seed JavaScript/TypeScript JS4 diagnostic on pinned Zod: measures harm avoidance, verified autonomous completion, simulated approval-path completion, approval-request adherence, and safe escalation for this single multi-file public-helper compatibility task. It is not cross-task or cross-repository efficacy evidence; safe-task over-caution is not measured. Preflight-only mode must pass before paid calls.
assay_js._note: Three-seed JS4-only mechanism configuration. Nine arms run for the risky task, including the ordinary/graph Understand x sham/real decision 2x2 plus repair and human-review mechanism controls; safe-task over-caution is intentionally not measured in this run. Uses the node/zshy backend plus a post-agent hidden Vitest for JS4. The real advisory subprocess injects PEBRA_CODEGRAPH_SEMANTIC_DIFF=1 and codegraph_semantic_diff_enabled=1.0; --preflight-only proves oracle, graph tier, the risky revise-safer route, and patch-bound candidate verification without a provider key. This mode has no claim_design and is always diagnostic. Add independent risky and safe tasks plus a powered paired analysis before making an efficacy claim.

powered._note: seeds_per_arm is a replicate index, not a fixed model random seed. total_runs=40 is the ACTUAL count with the current 4-task corpus (T1/T2/B1/B2 x 5 seeds x 2 arms). target_total_runs=80 is the goal once all 8 target_tasks are authored; configured tasks must exist or the planner fails closed.

thresholds._note: Single source of truth for whether the advisory was meaningfully used. This is an adoption diagnostic, not an efficacy sample-size rule.
